name: SKF 6204 Deep Groove Ball Bearing
specs: Dynamic Load: 13.5kN | Static Load: 6.55kN | Speed: 17000 r/min. Premium stainless construction.
description: High-speed precision engineered for industrial electric motors. Ensures zero-friction rotational stability under load.

name: FAG 7305 Angular Contact Bearing
specs: Dynamic Load: 28.5kN | Contact Angle: 40°. Universal matching capability.
description: Engineered for axial and radial loads in high-velocity spindle applications. Features optimized cage geometry.

name: SKF 22210 Spherical Roller Bearing
specs: Dynamic Load: 104kN | Explorer class. Open design for severe applications.
description: Self-aligning powerhouse designed to accommodate heavy radial and impact loads in mining and aggregate processing.

name: NBC 32212 Tapered Roller Bearing
specs: Dynamic Load: 140kN | Bore: 60mm | OD: 110mm. Single-row construction.
description: Exceptional rigidity for heavy-duty automotive transmissions. Maintains precise shaft alignment under maximum stress.

name: Timken NU210 Cylindrical Roller
specs: Dynamic Load: 69kN | Non-locating bearing type. High speed tolerance.
description: Optimized roller-end profiling minimizes stress concentrations, delivering unmatched longevity in industrial gearboxes.

name: SKF 51110 Thrust Ball Bearing
specs: Dynamic Load: 26kN | Static Load: 50kN. Single direction.
description: Precision thrust plate and caged ball assembly designed to manage extreme axial compression forces smoothly.

name: NTN UCP206 Pillow Block Bearing
specs: Bore: 30mm | Cast iron housing. Set screw locking mechanism.
description: Ready-to-mount bearing unit offering robust shaft support and self-alignment capabilities for industrial conveyors.
